## 📈 MSTR / Strategy Inc.

- **Current price: $119.48** — 52-week range $104–$457 · down **39%** this month, **−69%** past 12 months
- **Analyst consensus: Strong Buy** · 12-month target **$313.93** (range $163–$570, 19 analysts) *(MarketBeat)*
- **Bitcoin treasury: 845,256 BTC** · avg cost $66,385/BTC · total cost basis $33.1 B *(Bitbo)*
- 🚨 **First BTC sale since 2022:** Sold 32 BTC (May 26–31) at avg $77,135 to fund STRC preferred dividends — signals liquidity pressure; $10.8 B+ unrealised BTC losses, cash reserves down to ~$900 M *(GuruFocus)*
- Bull case hinges entirely on Bitcoin recovery; if BTC reaches analysts' $80–100 K targets, MSTR premium re-rating likely

---

## ₿ Bitcoin

- **Price: ~$61,494** (June 11) · Polymarket gives **100% odds** BTC stays below $70 K in June *(Fortune, Polymarket)*
- 📉 **ETF exodus: $5.4 B withdrawn** in 4 consecutive weeks · single-week record $1.72 B outflow *(Bitcoin Foundation)*
- ⚡ **Fear & Greed: 8 / 100 — Extreme Fear** (weekly freefall: 52 → 33 → 23 → 12 → 8) *(Alternative.me, BitDegree)*
- 🔀 **Retail vs. Institutional divergence:** Social sentiment at 2.23 : 1 bullish ratio (most bullish of 2026) while institutions exit — historically precedes short-term downside **or** marks capitulation bottom *(CoinMarketCap, DipProfit)*

## 🇺🇦 Ukraine — War Update

- **Ceasefire diplomacy:** Zelenskyy proposed face-to-face talks with Putin; backed by UK, France & Germany — **Putin declined**, calling it pointless for now *(Al Jazeera)*
- **Air war continues:** Russia struck Zaporizhia — 5 killed, 14 injured; Ukraine responded in kind *(Al Jazeera)*
- **Territorial stalemate:** Russia Matters shows Russia net-lost 93 sq mi over 4 weeks; Ukrainian OSINT (DeepState) shows Russia net-gained 3 sq mi — conflicting assessments *(Russia Matters)*
- **Estimated casualties:** ~1,000,000 Russian (killed + wounded); 250,000–300,000 Ukrainian

---

## 🇮🇷 Iran — War Update

- **Ceasefire collapsed:** June 7–10 saw worst strikes since April truce; US launched strikes on multiple Iranian targets June 9–10 · Trump warns further attacks possible *(CNN)*
- **Iran's posture:** Suspended operations vs. Israel but threatened resumption if Israeli strikes in Lebanon continue *(CNN)*
- **Hormuz Strait:** Traffic at just **15% of pre-war levels** — major global energy & shipping disruption *(Britannica)*
- **Humanitarian toll:** Thousands dead in Iran & Lebanon; dozens in Israel & Gulf states; millions displaced *(Britannica)*

---
